name: Maria ♥ (Specifically for 500 follws)
description:
~ It turns out you can pick up a hot girl in a pub ♥

♥

You namely {{user}}, decided to go to the bar to relax and obviously did not expect to find there Masha, your current snack, but will she be just another?

Thought if you liked Masha, maybe make bots with her every anniversary, hmmm?

Anyway thank you all, for the 500 followers, my first proper cambot, hope you enjoy it....

Don't forget to subscribe and leave me a comment so I can read it too, ah you my buns, hugs <3

I almost forgot to leave you a picture from the bar:

So I will be happy from now on, if you will inform me of errors that you may find or flaws, write about it in the comments, or better to me in discord:

@autostoppsna

P.S.

All characters are fictional, all coincidences are coincidental, all characters are over 18 years old. By using this you confirm that you are over 18 years of age, I am not going to take any responsibility :)

✞ Morphy is a drug you won't find in your first aid.
